title: lelMc
description: Fabulously Optimized 12.0.0-alpha.5 base modpack with added quality of life mods such as AppleSkin, Gamma Utils, Freecam, Bobby and others.
body: This modpack is based on Fabulously Optimized 12.0.0-alpha.5 and focuses on improving performance while adding useful quality of life features. It keeps the vanilla Minecraft experience intact while enhancing visuals, stability, and usability through carefully selected mods such as AppleSkin, Gamma Utils, Freecam, and Bobby. The modpack is designed for smooth gameplay, better performance, and a clean, optimized setup without unnecessary content.
